sn1.4:1.1: Sāvatthinidānaṁ. Ekamantaṁ ṭhitā kho sā devatā bhagavato santike imaṁ gāthaṁ abhāsi:
sn1.4:2.1: "Accenti kālā tarayanti rattiyo,Vayoguṇā anupubbaṁ jahanti;Etaṁ bhayaṁ maraṇe pekkhamāno,Puññāni kayirātha sukhāvahānī"ti.
sn1.4:3.1: "Accenti kālā tarayanti rattiyo,Vayoguṇā anupubbaṁ jahanti;Etaṁ bhayaṁ maraṇe pekkhamāno,Lokāmisaṁ pajahe santipekkho"ti.
